title: Greek Tiropita with Bulgur Salad
description: A classic Greek dish featuring a crispy tiropita pastry wrapped around a tangy spinach and feta filling, served with a hearty bulgur salad.
instructions: Roll out pastry dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Spread tiropita cheese mixture evenly, leaving a 1-inch border around the edges.
Fold the edges of the pastry up over the filling, pressing gently to seal.
Brush pastry with olive oil and bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the tiropita is baking, cook bulgur according to package instructions.
In a large bowl, combine cooked bulgur, spinach, feta cheese, red onion, and lemon juice.
Toss to combine and season with salt to taste.
Serve tiropita with a side of bulgur salad.
